2333280.name: The Platform
2333280.description:
Create.  Share.  Play.

The Platform by AGIS is the ultimate creative toolkit, enabling gamers of all ages to build and share experiences with their friends.  Supporting PC, Mac, Mobile and PCVR, jump right in and start creating whatever your imagination can conjure.

Gamers will find an endless supply of new worlds to play in. Game Designers will be able to create experiences easier than ever before with AI Assisted coding, and all the hard problems solved. Content creators will be able to leverage never-before-seen levels of Twitch integration with AI able to join your Stream and manipulate your game in real time.

Features

*Achieve more by collaborating with multi-user editing in real-time

*Step into your player’s shoes through immersive creation and gaming experiences in VR

*Click and load any asset from our free asset library or upload your own game assets.

*Don't know how to code?  No problem!  Use our in-game AI to write your code, and then its just click-to-configure with easy popup menus that help you fine tune your games logic.

*NPCs can talk! Powered by our next-gen AI and large language models audio generation to create-and-cache audio with a multitude of voices and voice cloning! Create sound effects, music, and more using prompts with AI-powered audio generation.

*Build once publish everywhere - Tablet, PS5, PSVR2, PCVR and Mobile!

*Use included high-end functionality to easily enhance gameplay variety, including destruction, water/volumes, weather, rivers, roads, fog, post processing, etc.

With The Platform, you to leverage a “modding” style approach to build games and experience with no separate Editor Application. The game is the editor is the game! 

Wishlist The Platform Now or join our discord to get early access to builds!
2333280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
